 # Required interfaces : MGT_Data

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.6.4)
project(SIMULATED_ACS_HW C)

include_directories(fsw/mission_inc)
include_directories(fsw/platform_inc)

aux_source_directory(fsw/src APP_SRC_FILES)


# Create the app module
add_cfe_app(simulated_acs_hw_app ${APP_SRC_FILES})

add_cfe_app_dependency(simulated_acs_hw_app dataview_lib)


# Executive services source files
target_include_directories(simulated_acs_hw_app PUBLIC ../../cfe/modules/es/fsw/src/)
target_link_libraries(simulated_acs_hw_app PRIVATE core_private)
